rationale: For an elderly user on an old iPad, extreme legibility, high contrast, and massive touch targets are paramount. We drop delicate aesthetics for undeniable clarity. Solid, high-contrast containers over subtle weather gradients to ensure readability.

typography.font_family: System fonts (San Francisco/Roboto) to maximize compatibility on older devices, explicitly set to bold/heavy weights.

MainLayout.structure: Bento Grid approach adapted for iPad. Landscape: Left column (60%) for Clock & Current Temp; Right column (40%) for Forecasts. Portrait: Stacked vertically with ample spacing.
MainLayout.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios are strictly maintained. Cards must have solid or highly opaque backgrounds to decouple text from the dynamic background gradients.

Header.elements: Search Bar (huge input) + Geolocation Button (massive touch target, min 64x64) + °C/°F Toggle (segmented control style).

ClockWidget.display: HH:MM (24h format for French). Date format: 'Lundi 14 Octobre'.

CurrentWeather.elements: Weather Icon (huge, ~120px), Temperature (160pt), Condition text (e.g., 'Ciel dégagé').

HourlyForecast.layout: Horizontal ScrollView. Cards must be wide enough to easily swipe.
HourlyForecast.item: Time (e.g., '14h'), Icon, Temp. Font size min 24pt.

DailyForecast.layout: Vertical list. Each row needs solid padding (py-4).
DailyForecast.item: Day name (e.g., 'Mar'), Icon, Min/Max Temp. Font size min 28pt.

media_and_icons.weather_icons_mapping: Use high-contrast filled icons (e.g., 'weather-sunny', 'weather-pouring') rather than thin outlines for better visibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a single-screen Expo React Native application.
DO NOT use web-only DOM components or tailwindcss web libraries. Use React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind.
Prioritize iPad dimensions. Use 'useWindowDimensions' to adjust layouts responsively.
Keep backgrounds visually simple if device performance is a concern; use 'expo-linear-gradient' for the weather-based backgrounds.
Translate all static UI text to French as requested (e.g., 'Aujourd\'hui', 'Rechercher...').
Ensure 'testID' props are applied to all interactive elements for automated testing.
